project_context.design_philosophy: Lead with editorial, not catalogue. The site must feel like an Aman Resort or Vogue editorial spread. High contrast, large dramatic photography, generous negative space, and refined typography. Invisible conversion architecture.

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2_section: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight leading-tight

rules.headings: Never use bold weights for primary headings. Stick to font-light or font-normal to maintain high-end elegance. Use italicized serif selectively for emphasis.
rules.body: Keep body text highly legible with generous line-height.
rules.alignment: Prioritize asymmetrical, left-aligned typography. Avoid default centering unless explicitly for a single-statement block quote or short hero title.

rules.contrast: Maintain WCAG AA compliance. Use Text Shadow on hero text overlaid on images.
rules.gradients: No pure gradients. Use subtle radial glows (blur-3xl) in background or a grainy dark noise texture.

grid_system.editorial_gallery: Asymmetrical masonry or bento grid mixing col-span-4 and col-span-8 to break catalogue monotony.

surfaces.cards: Borderless. Do not use standard Shadcn cards for models. Use pure image blocks with text floating below or on subtle hover overlay.
surfaces.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/60 border-b border-white/5 for sticky headers.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. This is critical for the luxury feel.

hover_states.images: Slow scale transform (scale-105) over 0.7s with ease-out. Transition from grayscale to full color, or subtle brightness increase.
hover_states.buttons: Text color shifts to primary accent, subtle 1px border glow, transparent background transitions to 5% white.

page_transitions.entrance: Fade in and translate-y-4 for staggered lists using Framer Motion.

header_nav.elements: Left: Brand Mark (Serif, tracking-widest). Center: Subtle text links. Right: 'Book Now' or 'WhatsApp' discreet button.

hero_section.style: Cinematic. 90vh to 100vh height. Large background image with heavy bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast.
hero_section.elements: Oversized Serif Heading, Mono Overline, subtle scroll down indicator.

model_grid.style: Shoppable Editorial lookbook. Not a rigid e-commerce grid.
model_grid.elements: Varying heights, large portrait photography. Model names in serif, vital stats in small mono text.

model_detail.elements: Split screen layout: sticky high-res portrait on the left, scrolling details, bio, and booking form on the right. Dark muted backgrounds.

admin_dashboard.elements: Dense, functional, clean lines. Use Shadcn UI extensively here. Sidebar navigation. Data tables for models and bookings.

hero_and_mood.description: Elegant silhouette of a woman at dusk. Perfect for discreet, moody hero background.
Artistic silhouette against bright background. Good for 'About Us' editorial block.

models_editorial.description: Grayscale fashion portrait of a woman. High fashion Vogue style.
Woman with long dark hair, elegant pose.
Woman's face emerging from dark background. Cinematic lighting.

locations_and_services.description: Hamburg port at night, elegant city lights.
Moody, dark, luxury hotel room interior. Ideal for 'Incall/Outcall' services context.
Dark, atmospheric hotel hallway. Represents discreet concierge service.

testing_attributes.instruction: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
testing_attributes.convention: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='hero-book-now-button' or data-testid='model-card-link'

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply fonts via Google Fonts or Next/Font (Cormorant Garamond and Outfit).
Ensure global CSS uses standard Tailwind base but override the background body color to #0A0A0B.
Construct the model grid using an asymmetrical layout. Do not use generic Shadcn cards for the main marketing site (use pure HTML/Tailwind for artistic freedom).
Use Shadcn UI strictly for the Admin Dashboard and complex forms (like the booking modal), styled to match the dark theme.
Implement the provided media_urls. Do not use placeholder services (e.g., placehold.it).
